instruction:
Differential equation of $\left\{\begin{matrix} {{y^{\prime\prime}+y=x}} & {{x \leq\pi}} \\ {{y^{\prime}+y=\operatorname{c o s} x}} & {{x > \pi}} \\ \end{matrix} \right.$ ,$\mathrm{y ~ \ ( 0 ) ~}=0 \,, \mathrm{y^{\prime} ~ \ ( 0 ) ~}=0$ , And continuous at $\mathbf{x}=\pi$, the solution is ().

Options:
A. $$
y=\left\{\begin{aligned} {{{x-\operatorname{s i n} x,}}} & {{{} {{x \leq\pi}}}} \\ {{{{\left( \pi+\frac{1} {2} \right) e^{\pi-x}+\frac{1} {2} \operatorname{c o s} x+\frac{1} {2} \operatorname{s i n} 2x,}}}} & {{{} {{x > \pi}}}} \\ \end{aligned} \right.
$$
B. $$
y=\left\{\begin{aligned} {{{x-\operatorname{s i n} x,}}} & {{{} {{x \leq\pi}}}} \\ {{{{\left( 3\pi+\frac{1} {2} \right) e^{\pi-x}+\frac{1} {2} \operatorname{c o s} x+\frac{1} {2} \operatorname{s i n} x,}}}} & {{{} {{x > \pi}}}} \\ \end{aligned} \right.
$$

$$
